summaryPrompt: Take the following extracted entities and combine them into a single cohesive paragraph. Maintain all factual details exactly as provided. Do not modify, add, or omit any of the extracted information.

entities.name: Study Author(s)
entities.prompt: Extract the study author(s). If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Author Affiliations
entities.prompt: Extract the author affiliations. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Study Title
entities.prompt: Extract the study title. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Publication Date
entities.prompt: Extract the publication date. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Journal
entities.prompt: Extract the journal name. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Test Material
entities.prompt: Extract the test material. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Test Substance Purity
entities.prompt: Extract the purity. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Test Substance Impurities
entities.prompt: Extract the test substance impurities. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Test Animal Species
entities.prompt: Extract the test animal species. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Test Animal Strain
entities.prompt: Extract the test animal strain. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Test Animal Sex
entities.prompt: Extract the sex of the test animals. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Number of Test Animals per Group
entities.prompt: Extract the number of animals tested per group. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Vehicle or Solvent Used
entities.prompt: Extract the vehicle or solvent used to administer the test material. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Negative Control
entities.prompt: Extract the negative control used in the study. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Route of Administration
entities.prompt: Extract the route of administration for the test material. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Dose Levels
entities.prompt: Extract the dose levels of the test material administered. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Lowest Dose Tested
entities.prompt: Extract the lowest dose tested. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Frequency of Administration
entities.prompt: Extract the frequency of administration of the test material. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Duration of Dosing Period
entities.prompt: Extract the duration of the dosing period. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Type of Study
entities.prompt: Extract the type of study conducted. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Parameters Investigated or Tested
entities.prompt: List all parameters investigated or endpoints assessed in the study. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Endpoints Assessed
entities.prompt: Extract the endpoints assessed in the study. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Statistical Analysis Methods
entities.prompt: Extract statistical analysis methods used in the study. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Results Presented
entities.prompt: Describe how the results are presented (qualitative or quantitative). If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Maternal Effects at All Doses
entities.prompt: Extract maternal toxicological effects at all doses administered. Present the information in a structured table format with the following columns: Dose Group, Dose (mg/kg bw/day or units reported), Effects Observed, Severity (if reported), Statistical Significance, LOAEL Assigned?, NOAEL Assigned?, Notes. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Offspring Effects at All Doses
entities.prompt: Extract offspring (fetal/pup) toxicological effects at all doses administered. Present the information in a structured table format with the following columns: Dose Group, Dose (mg/kg bw/day or units reported), Effects Observed, Severity (if reported), Statistical Significance, LOAEL Assigned?, NOAEL Assigned?, Notes. If not reported, output "Not Reported".

entities.name: Study Author-Identified Strengths and Limitations
entities.prompt: Extract study strengths and limitations identified by the authors. If not reported, output "Not Reported".
